notes: Post 28 failed after CC7.2.6 because the open_app payload was not reaching the old app-onepass scanner reliably after redeploy.
CC7.2.7 appends a bridge payload recovery script to served app.js without touching the visual layout.
Recovery scans MAX bridge objects for payload/start_param/commentKey/postId/channelId, then reopens /app with explicit query parameters.
Expected test: after deploy, Post 28 should recover and open as Post 28 instead of showing Не удалось определить пост.
